mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, department, real_name, email, is_enabled, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, username, password, department, real_name, email, is_enabled, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, username, password, department, real_name, email, is_enabled, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND department = #{department} AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%') ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_user (id, username, password, department, real_name, email, is_enabled, create_name, create_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{password}, #{department}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{isEnabled}, #{createName}, #{createId})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_user SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sp_user SET is_enabled = #{isEnabled} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_user WHERE username = #{username} AND id != #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
